query: SELECT t.id, t.masterTeamId, t.seasonId, mt.name as masterTeamName, s.name as seasonName FROM teams t LEFT JOIN masterTeams mt ON t.masterTeamId = mt.id LEFT JOIN seasons s ON t.seasonId = s.id LIMIT 20
